title: Creative Graphic Designer
description:
We’re looking for a creative powerhouse to join our team and take our visuals to the next level! If you live and breathe design, know what makes content pop on Instagram and Telegram, and love creating engaging visuals that people can’t scroll past — this is for you.

What you’ll be doing:

  • Create, develop, and enhance eye-catching graphics, motion graphics, and interactive content for Telegram, Instagram, and our brand channels.
  • Manage and grow our Telegram Channel and social platforms with scroll-stopping creative.
  • Deliver a wide range of creative work: graphics, motion graphics, video edits, product shoots, packaging design, and photo retouching/manipulation.
  • Conceptualise fresh, original, and innovative visual stories that spark engagement and brand love.
  • Work closely with our Editorial, Campaign, and Marketing teams to craft performance-driven creatives.
  • Contribute your photography and videography skills (a big plus!) to bring our campaigns to life.
  • Take on ad-hoc creative challenges — no two days are the same here.

What we’re looking for:

  • At least 2 years of hands-on experience in graphic/motion design.
  • You’re innovative, responsible, and resourceful — always finding ways to make things work beautifully.
  • Meticulous with a sharp eye for detail and amazing time management skills.
  • Proven track record of creating content that meets deadlines and drives engagement.
  • Familiar with social media trends, especially Telegram Channels in Singapore and Instagram.
  • Highly proficient in design tools like Adobe Suite, Canva, Sketch, Figma, Capcut.
  • A self-starter who takes initiative, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and loves bringing fresh ideas to the table.

✨ Why join us?

At Confirm Good, your creativity won’t just sit in a folder — it’ll be seen by hundreds of thousands of users daily. You’ll have the freedom to experiment, grow your skills, and make a visible impact with your work.

📩 Send us your resume + portfolio to jessie@confirmgood.com for our review.

Check us out here:

postedCompany.description:
Confirm Good is a Singapore-based media publishing platform that brings the latest deals, news and happenings to locals in our little red dot.


We offer first-hand information on deals and promotions on a daily basis and we curate and pick out the best deals for our subscribers. We are the first Telegram channel in Singapore to have exclusive partnerships with well-loved brands such as Krispy Kreme, Llao Llao, LiHO, and Tiger Sugar to offer our subscribers giveaways, one-for-one deals, and many other promotions and discounts!


We are expanding to bring our tight-knit community even closer by adding a more personal touch to our offerings through Confirm Good with not only a wider variety of partnerships, but also with articles covering various topics to appeal to a wider demographic.


With well-researched insights and advice spanning a wide range of topics, we seek to deliver simple to understand and beneficial contents for our readers.


We are always on a lookout for talents and we can offer you a broad range of exciting careers of your choice.


To qualify for a full-time position with us, we would prefer it if you have at least 2 years of working experience in a relevant field or if you can impress us with your work. 


If you are really keen to try your hand at something new and don’t have the experience, you can apply for our 6-month Internship Program.


We look forward to hearing from you :)


Don’t worry, Confirm Good Lah!
postedCompany.name: CONFIRM GOOD PTE. LTD.
